gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/201)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/201)
text: إِنَّ أَمْرَنَا مَسْتُورٌ مُقَنَّعٌ بِالْمِيثَاقِ فَمَنْ هَتَكَ عَلَيْنَا أَذَلَّهُ اللَّهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Khalid Bin Najeeh,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Our<sup>asws</sup> matter is veiled, masked by the Covenant. So the one who tears (the veil) upon us, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Disgrace him’.
en.sarwar: 15. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Khalid ibn Nujayh from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Our cause is hidden and veiled by the (Divine) covenant. Whoever disregards it against us Allah will humiliate him.”
